creator: dor.bsd@xm0.uk
text:
Hi,

I'm looking at this now, however, node_exporter 1.7.0 is very broken on FreeBSD and doesn't even compile. An upstream PR which was supposed to fix some ZFS issues appears to be incomplete and instead broke the upstream code.

I've submitted an issue and will track it. As soon as an update can be made here, it will be.

-David
